1.0.0.description:
### Basic Manual implementation and Mod for Grappledog.

Path the game using the delta patcher and the attached xdelta patch file.

You start with 1 level Available, however all levels are unlocked with the patch to allow you to go to the levels you have available.
Locations are gems, bonus coins, Completing Levels and beating bosses.
I personally send checks at checkpoints, but you can send them as soon as you grab the item or after you beat a level, your choice.
Goal is beat all bosses and then NUL, to open a boss level you currently need the level and the correct amount of gems.
Two extra checks exist in the form of petting the dog and getting a high score in your video game
